description: Configure bcWebCam to transmit barcode scan results via TCP/IP to host '127.0.0.1' on port '9100'. Open bcWebCam's settings/options dialog (gear icon in the bottom toolbar), navigate to the output or network settings section where TCP/IP configuration is available, enable the TCP/IP output mode, and enter the target host address (127.0.0.1) and port number (9100). Apply/save the settings when finished.
